title: Digital Marketing Fresher
description:
Job description




Company Description:

 

DigitalDC is a Bengaluru-based performance marketing company that specializes in helping D2C and B2B companies create and grow their online revenue through strategic advertising campaigns. DigitalDC manages brands with data-driven strategies to unlock the full potential of brands. DigitalDC have accelerated growth and revenue for over 120+ Brands using Meta Ads, Google Ads, Whatsapp Automation & Email Marketing.

 

Role Description

 This is a full-time on-site role at DigitalDC in Bengaluru. You will be responsible for market research, market strategy, lead generation, and media buying tasks on a day-to-day basis.

 

Job Description

 

· Receive comprehensive training on lead generation using social media and industry leading tools & effective campaign structure.

· Receive effective hands on training to research, track, maintain, and update lead information regularly & Conduct client audit and do market surveys to gather information on potential leads.

· Potential High Performance Candidates to navigate to receive comprehensive training on Facebook Ads and Google Ads to enhance lead generation and campaign management skills through hands-on training and guidance.

· Develop and implement marketing and advertising campaigns to promote products.

· Track marketing budgets by comparing actual results with forecasts and plans.

· Learn intensively about Digital Marketing from workflows to Campaign Monitoring & Support, Content Creation, Social Media Market Research, Analytics & Reporting.

Qualifications

 

Any Bachelors Degree

Action-oriented with a proactive approach

Strong communication skills

Highly motivated with a strong work ethic

 

Work Timings:

Mon to Sat ( 9 AM to 6 PM )

 

 

Work Location - Onsite:

Sahakar Nagar, Hebbal, Bengaluru

title: Food and Beverage Service Staff
description:
Company Description




Sodexo, founded in 1966 in Marseille by Pierre Bellon, is a global leader in food and services, dedicated to improving everyday experiences at work, health, education, and leisure. Present in 43 countries, Sodexo serves 80 million consumers daily and employs 426,000 people worldwide. The company is committed to fostering economic, social, and environmental progress in the communities it operates while striving to improve the quality of life for its employees and customers. Sodexo is recognized by prestigious indices such as CAC Next 20 and FTSE 4 Good, underscoring its global impact and responsible business practices.




Role Description

The Food and Beverage Apprentice will assist in delivering high-quality food and beverage services to clients and customers. Responsibilities include serving food and beverages, maintaining cleanliness and hygiene standards, ensuring customer satisfaction, and supporting the culinary team. This is a 1 year contract-based, after completion will be absorb a full time employee on-site role located in Bengaluru.




Qualifications: Min 10th Standard pass out.

Location: Bangalore

Salary: 13000 to 15000 per month plus attendance bonus

Food and accommodation will be provided




Requirements

Ability to work effectively in a team-oriented environment
Attention to detail with a commitment to maintaining hygiene and safety standards
Willingness to develop skills through hands-on training and learning opportunities




Only #fresher candidate or candidate without UAN can apply.




This is hiring under NAPS.

title: Sales Associate & Intern
description:
Location: Bangalore (Indiranagar)

Experience: Fresher to 2 Years




Job description:

Want to become a founder someday?

If you aspire to build your own company, lead a business unit, or become a startup operator, learning sales and customer understanding is the best place to start.

At Lane, this role will teach you how to:

Understand real customer problems
Learn how to sell and influence decisions
Develop strong storytelling and pitching skills
Think in terms of revenue and business growth
Solve problems in real time

Many great founders started in sales — because nothing teaches business faster than talking to customers every day.

If you’re curious, ambitious, and want to build something meaningful in the future, this role will give you a strong foundation.




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving education to helping people buy their first car, we’re building a trusted mobility platform for first-time drivers.

With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re expanding our team and hiring Sales Executives and Sales Interns in Bangalore to power our next phase of growth.

We’re looking for friendly, energetic, and people-loving individuals who enjoy talking to customers as much as closing deals.




What You’ll Do

Achieve sales targets and celebrate wins with the team
Greet customers warmly and assist them in selecting the right services
Handle customer inquiries and provide appropriate solutions
Own and manage the sales funnel from lead generation to conversion
Track and analyze funnel metrics to improve performance
Collaborate with sales and operations teams to improve efficiency
Drive revenue growth through data-driven sales execution




Who Should Apply

0–2 years of experience in sales, business development, or customer success
Strong communication and problem-solving skills
Motivated to grow in a high-performance startup environment

Sales experience is great — but attitude and hunger to learn matter even more.




What’s On Offer

Attractive incentives in addition to fixed pay
10-day onboarding and sales training program
Be part of a fast-scaling mobility startup
Real career growth opportunities

title: Sales Associate/Intern
description:
Location: Bengaluru (Indiranagar)

Reporting to: Sales Manager

Experience: Fresher - 2 years

Type: Full-time




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving programs to car buying & selling within our trusted community, we’re building a tech-enabled mobility ecosystem for first-time drivers. With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re scaling fast — and sales sits at the heart of our growth journey.




Role Overview

As a Sales Executive, you will drive revenue by converting high-intent leads into paying customers. You’ll work closely with marketing, operations, and customer success teams to ensure a seamless experience from first interaction to onboarding. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys speaking with customers, understands consultative selling, and wants to grow in a fast-paced startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

Convert inbound leads into customers via calls and WhatsApp
Understand customer requirements and recommend the right driving package
Manage follow-ups and maintain strong pipeline hygiene
Track daily conversions and revenue targets
Coordinate with operations for smooth onboarding
Maintain CRM data accuracy
Identify customer objections and improve pitch quality
Upsell relevant services (RTO assistance, car buying support, etc.)




What we are Looking for

1–3 years of experience in inside sales / telesales / EdTech / mobility / service sales
Strong communication skills (English + Hindi preferred; Kannada is a bonus)
High ownership mindset
Comfortable working with targets and performance metrics
Basic understanding of Google Sheets / CRM tools
Ability to handle objections confidently
Startup attitude — adaptable, fast learner, action-oriented




What You will Gain

Direct exposure to startup growth and revenue strategy
Clear performance metrics & learning curve
Opportunity to grow into senior sales / city lead roles
High ownership from Day 1
Work closely with founders

title: Sales Operations Intern
description:
Job description

Company Description

Welcome to Hacker Academy, where we empower cybersecurity excellence through hands-on education and cutting-edge solutions. Our unique approach emphasizes practical learning and capstone projects, preparing you for real-world cyber challenges. Join our community of learners and professionals to stay ahead in the ever-evolving cybersecurity landscape. We provide tools and knowledge to defend against cyber threats by leveraging extensive expertise and industry insights. Hacker Academy serves as a global hub for technology-driven risk management and cybersecurity solutions, making cybersecurity accessible and effortless for organizations worldwide.




Job Title:

Sales & Operations Intern / Fresher (Webinar & Conversion Team Lead)




About the Role

We are looking for enthusiastic, driven, and communication-oriented freshers or interns who are interested in exploring Sales, Operations, and Team Leadership. This role focuses on leading a small team of interns and coordinating candidate follow-ups, attendance, and conversions for our webinars and training programs.

Whether you are just starting your career or looking to build practical experience in sales and business operations, this role offers hands-on learning, growth, and performance-based compensation.




Employment Type

Internship / Fresher Position
Paid or Unpaid (Based on evaluation, interview performance, and prior experience)
Performance-Linked Stipend Confirmed for A & B Grade performers




Who Can Apply




Freshers with excellent communication skills
Students or recent graduates looking for hands-on, real-time corporate experience
Individuals interested in Sales, Business Development, Customer Operations, EdTech coordination, or Leadership roles
Candidates willing to learn, take ownership, and handle weekly targets




Key Responsibilities




Manage and coordinate communication with leads and webinar registrants
Motivate and guide interns assigned under you to meet outreach and conversion targets
Track attendance and follow-ups for webinar sessions
Assist in closing candidate enrollments for the training program
Maintain structured reporting and CRM (training provided)
Ensure clear communication between internal teams and candidate groups
Execute daily operational tasks related to webinar success, logistics, and onboarding




Skills We Are Looking For




Excellent spoken and written communication
Confidence and leadership mindset
Basic understanding of sales or willingness to learn
Ability to work under targets
Time management, consistency, and professionalism

(No technical knowledge required — training will be provided.)




Stipend Structure

Performance Level

Criteria

Compensation

A Grade

Exceeds weekly targets + strong leadership & communication

Guaranteed stipend + performance bonus

B Grade

Meets weekly targets + consistent communication

Guaranteed stipend

C Grade

Partial or below target performance

No stipend (Unpaid), may continue & improve)

D Grade

No consistency or performance

Internship discontinued

A certificate and a performance letter will be provided upon successful completion.




Work Mode




Remote
Flexible timing (target-based, not hour-based)
4–6 weeks internship duration (extendable or convertible based on performance)




Why Join




Learn real-world sales & operations
Lead teams early in your career
Work in a performance-driven culture
Opportunity for a long-term paid role based on performance
Practical exposure to CRM, communication strategy, and decision-making

title: CA Fresher - Finance Analyst
description:
Responsibilities

For CA freshers only

Strategy and Planning


Strategic Planning: Participate in the development of long-term financial strategies, plans and objectives that align with the organizations mission and goals.
Business Planning: Conduct analysis and provide recommendations on business opportunities, market trends and competition.
Financial Projections: Prepare financial projections and provide insights into the organizations future financial performance.
Resource Allocation: Analyze and evaluate the allocation of resources to ensure optimal utilization of resources to achieve strategic goals.
Performance Tracking: Develop and implement performance tracking mechanisms to monitor progress against strategic plans and objectives.
Budgeting: Participate in the development and implementation of budgeting processes that support the organization's strategic goals.
Risk Management: Conduct risk assessments and develop risk mitigation strategies to minimize the impact of potential risks on the organization's financial performance.
Business Intelligence: Gather, analyze and interpret business data to provide insights into the organizations performance and future trends.
Market Analysis: Conduct market research and analysis to identify market trends and provide insights into the competitive landscape.
Performance Management: Develop and implement performance management processes that support the organization's strategic objectives.


Budgeting and Forecasting


Preparation of Budget: Prepare and maintain budgeting templates, develop detailed budget plans and monitor budget performance regularly.
Forecasting: Prepare financial forecasts using historical data and market trends, and provide regular updates to management.
Cost Analysis: Analyze cost structures and trends to identify areas for cost reduction, and provide recommendations to management.
Revenue Forecasting: Analyze revenue data, prepare revenue projections and provide recommendations to management on revenue growth opportunities.
Scenario Planning: Develop various forecasting scenarios to evaluate potential outcomes and support decision-making.
Variance Analysis: Analyze variances between actual and budgeted results and provide recommendations for improvement.
Trend Analysis: Monitor industry trends, competitor trends and economic trends to provide insights and support decision-making.
Risk Management: Assess and identify financial risks associated with budget and forecast outcomes and provide recommendations for mitigating such risks.
Collaboration with Business Units: Work with business units to understand their operational plans and incorporate them into budget and forecast plans.


Financial Planning and Reporting


Prepare and analyze financial reports: Generate and review financial statements, income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements and other reports to provide insights into the financial performance of the organization.
Financial Planning: Develop and implement financial plans, budgets and forecasts that align with the organization's goals and objectives.
Variance Analysis: Conduct variance analysis to identify areas of overspending or underspending and provide recommendations to management.
Performance Evaluation: Evaluate the financial performance of the organization and provide recommendations to improve financial results.
Reporting to Management: Provide regular updates to management on the financial performance of the organization and highlight key financial metrics.
Stakeholder Reporting: Prepare and distribute financial reports to stakeholders, including shareholders, banks, and regulatory agencies.
Budget Monitoring: Monitor the organization's budget and ensure that expenditures are aligned with the approved budget.
Financial Dashboards: Develop and maintain financial dashboards to provide real-time insights into the organization's financial performance.
Financial Trends Analysis: Analyze financial trends, both internally and in the market, to provide insights into the organization's financial position.
Forecasting: Develop and maintain financial forecasting models to predict future financial results and identify potential risks and opportunities.


Analytics


Dashboard Development: Develop and maintain dashboards, scorecards and other reporting tools to provide actionable insights on business performance.
Predictive Modelling: Use statistical analysis and machine learning algorithms to predict future trends, patterns and potential risks.
Big Data Analysis: Work with large datasets and leverage data analytics tools to uncover insights and improve decision-making.
Financial Forecasting: Use analytics techniques to generate accurate and timely financial forecasts.


Cost Optimization: Utilize analytics to identify cost-saving opportunities and improve the efficiency of business operations.


Customer Analysis: Analyze customer data to understand buying patterns, preferences and identify opportunities for growth.
Sales Analysis: Analyze sales data to understand market trends, customer behavior and identify opportunities for growth.
Supply Chain Analysis: Analyze supply chain data to identify bottlenecks, improve efficiency and reduce costs.
Performance Monitoring: Monitor key performance indicators and provide regular reports on business performance.
Data Visualization: Create data visualizations to communicate complex data insights in an easy-to-understand format.

title: Customer Support - Freshers - Pune/Bangalore
description:
👥 Who We Are Hiring

💬 Customer Support

We are looking for customer-focused individuals with 0 to 5 years of international voice processing experience to join our International Voice Support team. As a Customer Support Executive, you will be the first point of contact for global customers, assisting them with queries, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring a seamless service experience.

Come build your career with Infosys BPM.

title: Software Engineer (L1)
description:
Relevant Experience: Fresher

We are seeking a highly motivated Fresher Software Engineer to work on our product. The ideal candidate will have a solid understanding of programming concepts, object-oriented programming, and strong analytical and problem-solving skills. You will be working with a range of technologies including C#, .NET Core, SQL, MongoDB, BigQuery, Kafka, Redis, and potentially Angular.

Required Skills And Qualifications


Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
Good understanding of programming concepts and object-oriented programming.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Proficiency in at least one object oriented programming language; knowledge of C# is a plus.
Familiarity with .NET Core framework.
Basic understanding of SQL and database management.
Eagerness to learn and work with MongoDB, BigQuery, Kafka, and Redis.
Knowledge of Angular is a plus.
Good programming aptitude and ability to quickly adapt to new technologies.
Strong communication skills and ability to work in a team environment.


Key Responsibilities


Collaborate with a team of experienced engineers to develop and maintain software applications.
Write clean, scalable, and efficient code using C# and .NET Core.
Participate in code reviews and contribute to the development of best practices.
Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects.
Work with databases such as SQL, MongoDB, and BigQuery to manage and analyse data.
Assist in developing and maintaining front-end applications using Angular (if applicable).
Continuously learn and apply new technologies and methodologies.
Contribute to the overall improvement of the codebase and the development process.

title: Fresher – Accounting & Data Entry
description:
Job Title: Fresher – Accounting & Data Entry

Company: CoffeeWeb Technologies Private Limited, Bangalore

Employment Type: Full-Time

 

About CoffeeWeb:

CoffeeWeb Technologies Private Limited empowers the global coffee industry with data, insights, and information solutions. We provide market data, industry news, analytics, and tools for exporters, importers, roasters, traders, and producers. Our platform helps stakeholders stay updated on trends, prices, and market developments for informed business decisions.

  

Role Overview:

As a fresher in Accounting & Data Entry, you will support the accounts and administrative teams in maintaining accurate financial records and managing office operations. This role offers hands-on experience and is ideal for candidates looking to start a career in finance, data management, or business administration.




Key Responsibilities:

·        Enter, update, and maintain financial and transactional data in company systems.

·        Assist in preparing invoices, bills, and expense reports.

·        Support accounts team with reconciliations, ledger updates, and basic bookkeeping.

·        Ensure accuracy and timely processing of data.

·        Assist in day-to-day administrative tasks and office management.

·        Maintain records, files, and documentation.

·        Coordinate with teams for smooth workflow and task tracking.

·        Support management in scheduling meetings, preparing reports, and other ad-hoc tasks.




Required Skills:

·        Bachelor’s degree in Commerce, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.

·        Basic knowledge of MS Office (Excel, Word, Outlook).

·        Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

·        Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

·        Good communication skills (verbal and written).




Preferred (Optional):

·        Familiarity with accounting software such as Tally.

·        Basic understanding of accounting principles, data analysis, or reporting.




Educational Qualification:

·        Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or related field.




What We Offer:

·        Hands-on experience in accounting and administrative processes.

·        Mentorship and growth opportunities in finance and business administration.

·        Exposure to a professional corporate environment.

title: Operation Executive (fresher / tamil)
description:
Industry & Sector: Insurance & Financial Services — operational delivery across policy administration, claims processing and customer servicing for retail and commercial lines. The role sits at the intersection of operations, regulatory compliance and digital automation to ensure accurate policy lifecycle management and superior SLA-driven outcomes.

Job Title: Insurance Operations Specialist (On-site — India)

About The Opportunity

We are seeking a high-energy Insurance Operations Specialist to join an on-site operations team focused on policy servicing, claims adjudication and process excellence. This role is ideal for candidates who combine domain knowledge with strong execution skills, system familiarity (Guidewire / policy systems) and a bias toward automation and continuous improvement.

Role & Responsibilities


Manage end-to-end policy administration activities: new business intake, endorsements, renewals, cancellations and mid-term adjustments with accuracy and timeliness.
Execute claims operations: intake, validation, adjudication and settlement while maintaining compliance with IRDAI guidelines and internal SLAs.
Support underwriting operations by providing documentation, risk referrals, issuance coordination and exception resolution.
Monitor SLAs and TATs; perform reconciliations, root-cause analysis and implement process improvements to reduce cycle-times and errors.
Operate and update policy/claims systems and CRM (Guidewire PolicyCenter / Salesforce) to maintain audit-ready records and generate operational reports.
Drive automation and standard operating procedures—work with RPA/tech teams to identify automation candidates and test deployments; handle escalations and cross-functional coordination for audits and compliance reviews.


Skills & Qualifications

Must-Have


Policy administration
Claims processing
Endorsements and renewals
Underwriting support
IRDAI compliance
Advanced MS Excel
Guidewire PolicyCenter
Salesforce


Preferred


UiPath
SQL
TCS BaNCS


Qualifications


Bachelor's degree or equivalent; strong preference for candidates with prior experience in insurance operations, policy servicing or claims teams.
Demonstrable track record of meeting SLAs and improving operational KPIs; experience with audits and regulatory reporting in the Indian insurance market is preferred.
On-site availability in India and ability to coordinate with cross-functional stakeholders (underwriting, finance, legal, IT).


Benefits & Culture Highlights


Hands-on role with clear impact on operational KPIs and customer satisfaction
Opportunities to lead process automation initiatives and work with modern insurance systems
Collaborative, metrics-driven environment focused on continuous improvement and professional growth


To apply, bring domain expertise in insurance operations, strong system skills (Guidewire / Salesforce), and a results-oriented approach to delivering consistent, compliant operations at scale.

Skills: skills,insurance,automation,operations,compliance,salesforce

title: Fresher - Customer Support (International Voice Process)
description:
We are seeking a Patient support service - Voice to handle customer queries and provide assistance related to healthcare services. The role requires effective communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.

 

Key Responsibilities:

Handle inbound and outbound calls related to healthcare services.
Service customers seeking support with their monthly healthy benefit package.
This monthly benefit can be used in pharmacies and is present on a card to be used for over-the-counter medications such as cold/flu and nutritional supplements.
Customers will seek help with replacement cards, balance checks, and contact information updates.
Successful associates can distinguish varying levels of customer complexity & communicate effectively.
Ensure compliance with HIPAA and other healthcare regulations.
Resolve customer queries efficiently while maintaining professionalism.
Maintain records of patient interactions and escalate complex cases when needed.

Strong verbal and written communication skills.

Bachelor’s degree in any field.

title: Centralized Study Spec I
description:
Summary Of Responsibilities


Manage clinical systems.
Manage study documents and support eTMF management.
Maintain study databases (CTMS, IWRS, EDC, etc.)
Track and follow up with CRAs for outstanding issues.
Support in generating the study specific reports.
Manage internal/external communications.
Assist in ensuring training compliance for study teams.
Assist in study payments (Site and Vendor).
Data Review:
Follow up with CRA for resolution of the outstanding issues/action items related to assigned tasks.
Perform Associate Lead/Lead role for assigned projects.
Draft and send study specific reports as per the study team instructions.
Collaborate with DM, Programming team for reports and communication of data related tasks.
Perform any other data review related tasks as per the project team instructions.
Study Support:
Generate Study Reports and perform analysis.
Perform Access management on applicable study systems.
Perform study system set up on new awarded studies.
CTMS compliance management.
Manage project communications.
Assist project teams for other study support activities.
Investigator Payments:
Review EDC, Contract, and mark line items “Ready to Pay/Screen Failure” in CTMS
Work with PA to generate cover letter or Proforma invoice and payment batch generation in CTMS.
Perform Invoice QC and Prepare GIA as applicable.
Coordinate with CTL, PM for line-item approvals and GIA approvals.
Process Out of Pocket and Pass-Through Expense Invoices.
Perform payment reconciliation during the study close out or on ad hoc request by the study team.
Act as a mentor and provide training to new joiners in team.
Performing quality check of the work delivered by the team as a part of the QC process.
To follow all applicable departmental Standard Operating Procedures and Work Instructions:
To complete required trainings according to required timelines.
To complete day-to-day tasks ensuring quality and productivity.
To manage project and technical documentation in an appropriate manner.
To provide administrative and technical support to internal departments and teams as needed.
To perform checks to ensure quality of work completed.
To ensure timely escalation and issue resolution as needed.
To execute high quality, timely monitoring and reporting plan(s) including specialized monitoring requests for approved protocols.
To support implementation of new monitoring tools.
To track and report metrics as determined by management according to required timelines.
To proactively identify opportunities for process improvements and support the implementation of process improvement activities.
To support the implementation of tools internally to enhance deliverables.
Ability to mentor and train others.
To assist in the document management (including document template creation, collection, review, processing and tracking up to eTMF filing) for all documents in the scope of agreed processes/activities or within the scope of GSDM throughout the study duration.
To assist in the preparation of new investigator submission packages for site/regulatory submission.
To support study team for contracts and budgets activities for investigative sites.
To assist the study start-up teams with tasks required for site start up activities.
To review, Support, Manage or assist in Managing the site clinical trial contracts in accordance with defined processes and timelines.


Qualifications (Minimum Required)


University/College Degree (Life Science preferred), or certification in an allied health profession from an appropriate accredited institution (Ex. Nursing certification, Medical or laboratory technology) and 5-8 years of work.
Experience in clinical research, including a strong working knowledge of the ICH-GCP guidelines and all other applicable guidelines and regulations.
Fortrea may consider relevant and equivalent experience in lieu of educational requirements.


Experience (Minimum Required)


5-8 Years of experience in the job discipline.
0-5 Years of experience in other professional roles.
Other required work-related experiences:
Demonstrated ability to plan, prioritize, organize, and communicate effectively.
Demonstrated ability to pay attention to detail.
Strong interpersonal skills with ability to work well with others.
Ability to deliver consistent high quality of work.
Strong interpersonal skills.
Ability to Influence others.
Ability to facilitate meetings.
Ability to lead process improvement initiatives.


Preferred Qualifications Include


Candidate should be able to work in shifts if business demands for it.
May involve extensive use of computer and keyboard.


Learn more about our EEO & Accommodations request here.

title: Recruiting Intern
description:
JOB TITLE: IT RECRUITER/ Non HR
LOCATION: NOIDA SECTOR 62NIGHT SHIFT 7 PM TO 4 AM
EDUCATION: Bachelors (in any stream)

Recruitment Intern
Job Location: Noida Sector 62
Job type : Full time (Night shift)

Here’s a clear, professional Job Description for a Fresher / Entry-Level Technical Recruiter, suitable for Indian IT/GCC hiring environments. You can post this on job portals or share internally.

⸻

Job Title

Fresher Technical Recruiter / IT Recruiter (Entry Level)

Location

Noida Sector 62

Shift: US shift night shift

Experience

0–1 Year (Freshers welcome)

Education

Any Graduate / MBA (HR preferred) / Engineering background is a plus

⸻

Job Summary

We are looking for an enthusiastic Fresher Technical Recruiter to support our talent acquisition team in hiring IT and technical professionals. This role is ideal for fresh graduates who want to build a career in recruitment and HR within the IT industry.

⸻

Key Responsibilities
• Understand job requirements for IT and technical roles (developers, testers, engineers, etc.)
• Source candidates through job portals, LinkedIn, referrals, and databases
• Screen resumes and conduct initial HR/telephonic interviews
• Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers
• Maintain candidate pipeline and recruitment trackers
• Communicate with candidates regarding interview status and feedback
• Assist in offer rollout and joining formalities
• Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the hiring process
• Learn and follow recruitment best practices and compliance

⸻

Required Skills & Qualifications
• Basic understanding of IT roles and technologies (training will be provided)
• Good communication skills (verbal and written)
• Willingness to learn recruitment tools and job portals
• Basic knowledge of MS Excel / Google Sheets
• Strong interest in HR and recruitment
• Good attitude, discipline, and eagerness to grow

⸻

Preferred (Not Mandatory)
• Internship or certification in HR / Recruitment
• Exposure to LinkedIn sourcing or job portals
• Engineering or technical education background

⸻

What We Offer
• On-the-job training in IT recruitment
• Career growth into Senior Recruiter / Account Manager roles
• Friendly work environment
• Performance-based incentives
• Exposure to IT, GCC, and enterprise hiring

⸻

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description:
About the Company

ZeTheta Algorithms Private Limited (www.zetheta.com) is a FinTech start-up which has been recently set up and is developing innovative AI tools.

https://www.instagram.com/zetheta.official/




About the Role

We are seeking a talented and motivated student/ fresher intern to develop AI models from scratch within a 2 month timeframe. This is an extraordinary opportunity for a self-driven, technically skilled student to build a complete enterprise-grade system that incorporates cutting-edge AI technologies including deep learning.




Responsibilities

Design and implement the complete AI Models following provided specifications
Develop both frontend and backend components of the platform
Create and integrate AI modules
Design and optimize database schema and queries
Ensure system security, especially for sensitive identity verification data
Deploy the solution using zero-cost cloud services
Document code, APIs, and system architecture
Complete the entire project within the 2 month timeline




Qualifications

No experience required. Preferably, a student who is currently pursuing or fresh graduate who has recently completed a degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field.




Required Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Strong programming skills in Python and JavaScript
Understanding of React.js for frontend development and Node.js for backend
Knowledge of FastAPI or similar Python web frameworks
Familiarity with database design and SQL (particularly PostgreSQL with Supabase)
Deployment on AWS with CD/ CI Pipelines and Manual Environment in EC2 instance, S3
Understanding of basic machine learning concepts
Self-motivated with ability to work independently




Preferred Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Sound knowledge of AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, Keras, HuggingFace Transformers)
Familiarity with computer vision techniques using OpenCV
Knowledge of natural language processing concepts
Sound knowledge of facial recognition or emotion detection systems
Understanding of identity verification methodologies
Docker containerization experience
Prior work with cloud deployment (AWS)




Who Should Apply?

Student or fresh graduate from any academic discipline.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office.
Willingness to self-learn and work in a fast-paced environment.




Internship Details

Duration: Self paced, options for 15days or 1,2,3,4 or 6 months.
Type: Unpaid

title: MBA fresher
description:
Company Description

Econovus Packaging is India’s first carbon-neutral and green packaging engineering company, delivering eco-friendly, innovative solutions for the automotive, heavy engineering, renewable energy, and defense industries. Our unique sustainable packaging solutions help reduce carbon footprints by up to 93% while cutting packaging costs by up to 25%. As a fully compliant organization, we've achieved globally recognized certifications, including ISO 9001, 14001, 45001, FSC COC, and more. With significant contributions to mitigating 907 metric tons of carbon emissions, we proudly achieved carbon neutrality in 2024. Our solutions include export packaging, returnable packaging systems, CKD operations management, and UN-certified lithium-ion battery packaging.

Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site role for an MBA Fresher, based in the Pune/Pimpri-Chinchwad area. The selected candidate will assist in strategy development, market research, and business operations. Responsibilities include identifying growth opportunities, analyzing business trends, preparing reports and presentations, and collaborating across teams to ensure project success. The candidate will also contribute to the optimization of operational processes and assist in achieving organizational objectives.

Qualifications


Strong analytical, problem-solving, and research skills
Proficiency in business strategy development and market analysis
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to create professional reports and presentations
Proficiency in project management and collaboration tools
Ability to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment with cross-functional teams
Understanding of or interest in sustainable and eco-friendly business practices is a plus
Master of Business Administration (MBA) degree from a reputed institution
Proficiency in MS Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)

title: Student
company: BSA Crescent Institute of Science and Technology
description:
Company Description

B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology, located in Chennai, India, is a distinguished institution established under Section 3 of the UGC Act 1956. Previously known as B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Engineering College, it is one of India's largest engineering colleges, renowned for quality teaching, innovative research, and cutting-edge infrastructure. The institute provides a range of accredited undergraduate and graduate programs in engineering and other disciplines, promoting interdisciplinary studies and global academic standards. With modern hostel facilities, strong industry connections, and an emphasis on character development, the institution prepares students for successful careers and advanced studies globally. Its exceptional placement record showcases its commitment to student success.




Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site Student role based in Chennai at B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology. Students will engage in rigorous academic coursework, participate in interdisciplinary research, and take part in practical applications through real-world projects and industrial training. They will collaborate with peers and faculty in a supportive environment and have opportunities to engage in leadership development and extracurricular activities. The role demands active participation in both academic and campus life with a focus on academic excellence and personal growth.




Qualifications

Strong academic aptitude in sciences, mathematics, engineering, or other relevant fields.
Effective communication and interpersonal skills for collaborative projects and campus activities.
Problem-solving and analytical thinking abilities for academic and real-world challenges.
Demonstrated curiosity, critical thinking, and a commitment to continuous learning and skill development.
Interest in participating in research, innovation, and interdisciplinary projects.
Ability to adapt to on-campus life, including extracurricular involvement and leadership roles.
Eligibility based on academic qualifications as per the program requirements.

title: Digital Marketing Fresher
description:
Job description




Company Description:

 

DigitalDC is a Bengaluru-based performance marketing company that specializes in helping D2C and B2B companies create and grow their online revenue through strategic advertising campaigns. DigitalDC manages brands with data-driven strategies to unlock the full potential of brands. DigitalDC have accelerated growth and revenue for over 120+ Brands using Meta Ads, Google Ads, Whatsapp Automation & Email Marketing.

 

Role Description

 This is a full-time on-site role at DigitalDC in Bengaluru. You will be responsible for market research, market strategy, lead generation, and media buying tasks on a day-to-day basis.

 

Job Description

 

· Receive comprehensive training on lead generation using social media and industry leading tools & effective campaign structure.

· Receive effective hands on training to research, track, maintain, and update lead information regularly & Conduct client audit and do market surveys to gather information on potential leads.

· Potential High Performance Candidates to navigate to receive comprehensive training on Facebook Ads and Google Ads to enhance lead generation and campaign management skills through hands-on training and guidance.

· Develop and implement marketing and advertising campaigns to promote products.

· Track marketing budgets by comparing actual results with forecasts and plans.

· Learn intensively about Digital Marketing from workflows to Campaign Monitoring & Support, Content Creation, Social Media Market Research, Analytics & Reporting.

Qualifications

 

Any Bachelors Degree

Action-oriented with a proactive approach

Strong communication skills

Highly motivated with a strong work ethic

 

Work Timings:

Mon to Sat ( 9 AM to 6 PM )

 

 

Work Location - Onsite:

Sahakar Nagar, Hebbal, Bengaluru

title: Food and Beverage Service Staff
description:
Company Description




Sodexo, founded in 1966 in Marseille by Pierre Bellon, is a global leader in food and services, dedicated to improving everyday experiences at work, health, education, and leisure. Present in 43 countries, Sodexo serves 80 million consumers daily and employs 426,000 people worldwide. The company is committed to fostering economic, social, and environmental progress in the communities it operates while striving to improve the quality of life for its employees and customers. Sodexo is recognized by prestigious indices such as CAC Next 20 and FTSE 4 Good, underscoring its global impact and responsible business practices.




Role Description

The Food and Beverage Apprentice will assist in delivering high-quality food and beverage services to clients and customers. Responsibilities include serving food and beverages, maintaining cleanliness and hygiene standards, ensuring customer satisfaction, and supporting the culinary team. This is a 1 year contract-based, after completion will be absorb a full time employee on-site role located in Bengaluru.




Qualifications: Min 10th Standard pass out.

Location: Bangalore

Salary: 13000 to 15000 per month plus attendance bonus

Food and accommodation will be provided




Requirements

Ability to work effectively in a team-oriented environment
Attention to detail with a commitment to maintaining hygiene and safety standards
Willingness to develop skills through hands-on training and learning opportunities




Only #fresher candidate or candidate without UAN can apply.




This is hiring under NAPS.

title: Fresher diploma in mechanical engineering
description:
Company Description

Sree Parameshwari Industries specializes in manufacturing high-quality components, including auto components, drilling components, milling components, tapping components, grinding components, rolling components, and CNC turning parts. Known for precision and reliability, the company serves as a key player in delivering custom solutions for various industrial applications. With a commitment to quality and technical excellence, Sree Parameshwari Industries caters to a diverse range of industries. The company prides itself on its innovative approach to manufacturing and strong customer focus.

Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site role for a Fresher Diploma in Mechanical Engineering located in Chennai. The selected candidate will assist in operating and maintaining machinery, support design and drafting tasks using Computer-Aided Design (CAD) tools, and work on quality checks for manufactured components. The role also involves collaborating with the team to solve mechanical problems and ensure production targets are met efficiently.

Qualifications


Strong foundation in Mechanical Engineering principles
Proficiency in Computer-Aided Design (CAD) tools
Strong Analytical Skills and problem-solving abilities
Good Interpersonal Skills to collaborate effectively with team members and supervisors
Excellent Communication skills to convey technical ideas and progress clearly
Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies
Basic understanding of manufacturing processes and safety protocols is a plus

title: Sales Associate & Intern
description:
Location: Bangalore (Indiranagar)

Experience: Fresher to 2 Years




Job description:

Want to become a founder someday?

If you aspire to build your own company, lead a business unit, or become a startup operator, learning sales and customer understanding is the best place to start.

At Lane, this role will teach you how to:

Understand real customer problems
Learn how to sell and influence decisions
Develop strong storytelling and pitching skills
Think in terms of revenue and business growth
Solve problems in real time

Many great founders started in sales — because nothing teaches business faster than talking to customers every day.

If you’re curious, ambitious, and want to build something meaningful in the future, this role will give you a strong foundation.




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving education to helping people buy their first car, we’re building a trusted mobility platform for first-time drivers.

With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re expanding our team and hiring Sales Executives and Sales Interns in Bangalore to power our next phase of growth.

We’re looking for friendly, energetic, and people-loving individuals who enjoy talking to customers as much as closing deals.




What You’ll Do

Achieve sales targets and celebrate wins with the team
Greet customers warmly and assist them in selecting the right services
Handle customer inquiries and provide appropriate solutions
Own and manage the sales funnel from lead generation to conversion
Track and analyze funnel metrics to improve performance
Collaborate with sales and operations teams to improve efficiency
Drive revenue growth through data-driven sales execution




Who Should Apply

0–2 years of experience in sales, business development, or customer success
Strong communication and problem-solving skills
Motivated to grow in a high-performance startup environment

Sales experience is great — but attitude and hunger to learn matter even more.




What’s On Offer

Attractive incentives in addition to fixed pay
10-day onboarding and sales training program
Be part of a fast-scaling mobility startup
Real career growth opportunities
